models.source_notes: Trained via deepracer-for-cloud. Archive contains model_49.pb (TF protobuf) + model_metadata.json. 5 discrete actions (steering -30/-15/0/15/30 at speed 0.6). Network: DEEP_CONVOLUTIONAL_NETWORK_SHALLOW. Algo: clipped_ppo.
models.notes: Model binary (model_49.pb) not committed to git -- place the .gz contents in models/external/drfc-clipped-ppo/

models.source_notes: Continuous action space model. Steering -30 to 30, speed 1.25 to 2.8. Greyscale preprocessing. Network: DEEP_CONVOLUTIONAL_NETWORK_SHALLOW. Algo: clipped_ppo.
models.notes: Key differences from drfc-ppo: continuous action space (not discrete), greyscale preprocess, higher speed range (1.25-2.8 vs 0.6). Archive: CenterAlignModel-model.tar.gz
